calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Vacate Judgment And Enter Dismissal
Off Calendar Apr-04-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CREDIT ADJUSTERS, LLC'S Motion To Vacate Judgment And Enter Dismissal as follows:

Plaintiff National Credit Adjusters, LLC's motion to vacate the October 10, 2017 judgment and to dismiss this case with prejudice is GRANTED. The judgment is now vacated and the case is dismissed with prejudice. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Counsel for plaintiff is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the Court's ruling.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2017 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Continued To Nov-28-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
